revision.comment: create cat
revision.text: This is a maintenance category.

revision.comment: added [[Category:Articles with incomplete citations]] using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
revision.text:
This is a maintenance category.
[[Category:Articles with incomplete citations]]

revision.comment: Adding maintenance category template
revision.text:
{{Maintenance category|tracking=yes|hidden=yes|purpose=This category tracks pages tagged with {{tl|Ref expand}} or {{tl|Full citation needed}}.}}
[[Category:Articles with incomplete citations]]

revision.comment: correct the templates mentioned in the hatnote.
Undid revision 1033168924 by [[Special:Contributions/Turk bhai|Turk bhai]] ([[User talk:Turk bhai|talk]]) rv spam
[[WP:AES|←]]Blanked the page

9 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Category:All_articles_with_incomplete_citations]]
राम राम
revision.text: जय जाट

revision.comment: Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/Gujjarempire|Gujjarempire]] ([[User talk:Gujjarempire|talk]]) to last revision by Shellwood
11 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Category:All_articles_with_incomplete_citations]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (17 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Articles with incomplete citations]]
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 2 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
1 revision imported
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q104546147)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Maintenance category|tracking=yes|hidden=yes|purpose=This category tracks pages tagged with {{tl|Full citation needed}} or {{tl|Full citations needed}} or {{tl|Incomplete short citation}}.}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:All articles with incomplete citations]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_articles_with_incomplete_citations here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
